title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: This video explains agent harness engineering as a growing discipline for structuring agentic AI systems. It traces the evolution from prompt engineering through context engineering to harness engineering, covering loops and architecture patterns that enable more robust autonomous agent behavior.
